LANCER.Settings.CreateMacroTextInt: The macros name cannot be empty
LANCER.Settings.CreateMacroTextPerm: You do not have permission to create script macros
LANCER.Settings.SystemAIVoiceHint: Use randomized typing sounds from template/sysai
LANCER.Settings.typingSpeedHint: Delay between characters in the typewriter effect (higher = slower)
LANCER.Settings.globalTypingSpeedHint: Global delay between characters. Used when individual speed is not set.
LANCER.Settings.sentencePauseDelayHint: Extra delay in milliseconds after sentence-ending punctuation (., !, ?).
LANCER.Settings.autoSpeedHint: Automatically calculate typing speed based on voiceover duration and text length
LANCER.Settings.debugModeHint: Enable debug messages in the browser console
LANCER.Settings.voiceVolumeHint: Volume of the typing sound and voiceover
LANCER.Settings.FontFamilyHint: The font used for communicator messages
LANCER.Settings.FontSizeHint: Size of the message text in pixels
LANCER.Settings.globalMessageWidthHint: Global default width of the pop-up message box in percent (20% - 90%)
LANCER.Settings.MessageWidthHint: Width of this pop-up message box in percent (20% - 90%)
LANCER.Settings.EnableTextShakeHint: Toggle shaking animation for uppercase text
LANCER.Settings.PortraitHint: You can paste a direct image URL (e.g. from Imgur) or select a file from your Foundry library.
LANCER.Settings.PostToChatHint: After sending, the communicator message is duplicated to the Foundry chat log so players who missed it can read it
LANCER.Settings.PostImageToChatHint: If enabled, the attached image will be displayed in the chat log.
LANCER.Settings.AllowPlayersAccessHint: If enabled, players will see the Communicator button in token tools
LANCER.Settings.AllowPlayersExport: Allow Players to Export Chat Log
LANCER.Settings.AllowPlayersExportHint: If enabled, players can open the chat log window and export messages (GM always can)

Warnings.NoVoiceoverForAuto: Please select a voiceover file first for auto speed calculation!
Warnings.NoMessageForAuto: Please enter message text first for auto speed calculation!
Warnings.AutoSpeedFailed: Failed to load audio file for speed calculation
Warnings.VoiceoverTooShort: Voiceover file must be at least 3 seconds long!
Warnings.MacroAlreadyExists: A macro with this name already exists!
Warnings.NoExportPermission: You do not have permission to export the chat log
